scripts.test:node:
mkdir -p test-result coverage/node-v8 && NODE_V8_COVERAGE=coverage/node-v8 node --import tsx --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-reporter=junit --test-reporter-destination=test-result/node-junit.xml tests/*.test.ts && node --input-type=module -e 'import { readFileSync, writeFileSync } from "node:fs"; const path = "test-result/node-junit.xml"; const xml = readFileSync(path, "utf8"); const testcaseBlocks = xml.match(new RegExp(String.raw`<testcase [\s\S]*?</testcase>|<testcase [^>]*/>`, "g")) ?? []; const readCommentCount = (label) => Number((xml.match(new RegExp(String.raw`<!-- ${label} (\d+(?:\.\d+)?) -->`)) ?? [])[1] ?? "0"); const readAttribute = (block, key) => (block.match(new RegExp(String.raw` ${key}="([^"]*)"`)) ?? [])[1] ?? ""; const setAttribute = (block, key, value) => block.match(new RegExp(String.raw` ${key}="[^"]*"`)) ? block.replace(new RegExp(String.raw` ${key}="[^"]*"`), `${key}="${value}"`) : block.replace(//>$/, ` ${key}="${value}"/>`).replace(/>$/, ` ${key}="${value}">`); const suiteNameForTest = (name) => { if (name.startsWith("Build message:")) return "tests/bark_message_builder.test.ts"; if (name.startsWith("Encryption:")) return "tests/encryption.test.ts"; return "tests/bark_client.test.ts"; }; const suiteOrder = ["tests/bark_client.test.ts", "tests/bark_message_builder.test.ts", "tests/encryption.test.ts"]; const suiteMap = new Map(suiteOrder.map((suiteName) => [suiteName, []])); for (const block of testcaseBlocks) { const suiteName = suiteNameForTest(readAttribute(block, "name")); const normalizedBlock = setAttribute(setAttribute(block, "classname", suiteName), "file", suiteName); suiteMap.get(suiteName).push(normalizedBlock); } const tests = readCommentCount("tests") || testcaseBlocks.length; const failures = readCommentCount("fail") || Array.from(suiteMap.values()).flat().filter((block) => block.includes("<failure")).length; const skipped = readCommentCount("skipped") || Array.from(suiteMap.values()).flat().filter((block) => block.includes("<skipped")).length; const durationMs = readCommentCount("duration_ms"); const time = (durationMs / 1000).toFixed(6); const suites = suiteOrder.filter((suiteName) => suiteMap.get(suiteName).length > 0).map((suiteName) => { const blocks = suiteMap.get(suiteName); const suiteFailures = blocks.filter((block) => block.includes("<failure")).length; const suiteSkipped = blocks.filter((block) => block.includes("<skipped")).length; const suiteTime = blocks.reduce((sum, block) => sum + Number(readAttribute(block, "time") || "0"), 0).toFixed(6); return `  <testsuite name="${suiteName}" tests="${blocks.length}" failures="${suiteFailures}" skipped="${suiteSkipped}" time="${suiteTime}">
${blocks.map((block) => `    ${block}`).join("
")}
  </testsuite>`; }).join("
"); writeFileSync(path, `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<testsuites tests="${tests}" failures="${failures}" skipped="${skipped}" time="${time}">
${suites}
</testsuites>
`);' && npx c8 report --temp-directory coverage/node-v8 --reporter=lcovonly --report-dir test-result/node-coverage
scripts.test:bun: mkdir -p test-result test-result/bun-coverage && bun test --coverage --coverage-reporter=text --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir=test-result/bun-coverage --reporter=junit --reporter-outfile=test-result/bun-junit.xml tests/*.test.ts
